title: Moment of Perfect Mind
text:
{{||Spell}}
You may use this maneuver any time you would be required to make a Will save. Make a Concentration check instead of the Will save and use the result of that check to determine the save's success. You must use this maneuver before you attempt the Will save. A result of natural 1 on your Concentration check is not an automatic failure.
creator: Jeanbeaux
